data.title: Southern Building Group in Tennessee moves to employee ownership through ESOP with help from Viking Mergers & Acquisitions on Dec 12, 2025.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on December 12, 2025, Southern Building Group (SBG), a construction company located in Murfreesboro, has completed its move to employee ownership with the help of Viking Mergers & Acquisitions. This transition involved the creation of an Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) and marks a significant change for SBG.

data.title: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. to undergo 1-for-10 reverse stock split effective Dec. 15, 2025, trading symbol “INBS.”
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS) announced a 1-for-10 reverse stock split effective at 11:59 pm (Eastern Time) on December 15, 2025. Trading on Nasdaq will resume on December 16, 2025, under the symbol "INBS" with the new CUSIP number 36151G709. Intelligent Bio Solutions is a medical technology company providing intelligent, rapid, non-invasive testing solutions.

data.title: Fed officials divided on interest rate cut, citing rising inflation and slowing job market.
data.description: Federal Reserve officials have expressed their disagreement with the central bank's recent decision to reduce interest rates by 0.25%.

data.title: Pharmaceutical Filtration Market to reach $21.75 billion by 2030 with 8.7% CAGR growth rate per MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported on December 12, 2025 that the Pharmaceutical Filtration Market is anticipated to increase from approximately USD 14.35 billion in 2025 to USD 21.75 billion by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.7%. The market insights were provided by MarketsandMarkets™. The data is detailed across 408 market tables and 53 figures for analysis.

data.title: Judson Senior Living receives top honors for senior care in Northeast Ohio, with two communities being recognized nationally.
data.description: Two senior living communities run by Judson Senior Living, a not-for-profit organization that has been supporting older adults in Northeast Ohio since 1906, have recently been honored with national recognition for their dedication to providing top-notch care. The communities have been commended for their commitment to quality care and standout performance. This news announcement was made on December 12, 2025, in Cleveland. Judson Senior Living is known for its long history of service to the community and continues to excel in meeting the needs of older adults in the region.

data.title: Greenway signed a term sheet with Swift Creek, LLC on Dec. 5, 2025, for technology development.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Greenway Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: GWTI), a company specializing in advanced gas-to-liquids and gas-to-hydrogen technology development, announced the signing of a non-binding term sheet with Swift Creek, LLC (SCL). SCL, a native and veteran-owned company, helps tribes with technology and economic development. The agreement could provide access to U.S. government subsidies and funds due to its American ownership status. This partnership presents a significant opportunity for both companies to leverage their expertise in these fields.

data.title: Royal Canin partners with athletes for AKC National Championship, celebrating dogs as MVPs. Featuring Michelle Wie West and Fernando Mendoza. Dec 12, 2025.
data.description: To celebrate the 25th anniversary of North America's biggest dog show, a pet health nutrition brand has teamed up with athletes to honor our canine companions as the real MVPs in our lives. The collaboration takes place in St. Louis on December 12, 2025. Royal Canin® U.S., a prominent name in pet health nutrition, is the driving force behind this initiative to showcase the importance of pets in our daily lives.

data.title: Balfour Beatty Communities collaborates with U.S. Army at Fort Leonard Wood, groundbreaking 69 new homes with $50M investment.
data.description: In Fort Leonard Wood, Missouri, a groundbreaking ceremony was held by Balfour Beatty Communities to commemorate the start of construction for 69 new homes in the Woodlands neighborhood. The event, attended by military families, U.S. Army leadership, and officials' representatives, signifies the launch of a project aimed at revitalizing housing and improving the living standards of service members and their families. With a significant $50 million investment allocated for this initiative, the construction of these new homes is a pivotal step towards modernization and enhancing the quality of life for military personnel.

data.title: Abbott raises quarterly dividend by 6.8%, marking 54th straight year of increase. Total payout up by over 70% since 2020, with 408th quarterly dividend paid since 1924.
data.description: Abbott, based in Abbott Park, Illinois, recently revealed a 6.8% increase in its quarterly dividend. This marks the 408th consecutive quarterly dividend for Abbott, a streak that dates back to 1924. The dividend payout has surged by over 70% since 2020, underlining the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders. Abbott's board of directors approved this dividend increment, reflecting the company's financial stability and growth trajectory. Trading under the ticker symbol ABT on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), Abbott continues to showcase resilience and sustained performance in the market.
